name: Pressure Cooker Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef and onion in oil in the open pressure cooker.
2. Add salt and pepper, then 1/2 cup red wine.
3. Seal the cooker and cook at 10 pounds pressure for 15 minutes per pound.
4. Reduce pressure, open the cooker, and remove the meat.
5. To make gravy, remove all but 2 tablespoons of fat from the cooker.
6. Add flour and stir for 1 minute.
7. Slowly add the wine and stock, then simmer until thickened.
8. Season the gravy with salt and pepper to taste.
